title: Humenné, Prešov Region — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Humenné, Prešov Region: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Humenné is a city in Prešov Region with a population of 32,000. A town in eastern Slovakia near the Ukrainian border, known for its Renaissance castle, the Vihorlat Mountains, and a growing industrial sector.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
